textByHash.cbc7f51335f2da2f5cc38efc6e3f29901819100d: Don't bother me, can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.b261e57c8989fc025f75528f0417c4f93f8b3604: You can go in. The Consortium, in their infinite wisdom, has decided to open up the factory to all and sundry.
textByHash.578d09a43c3ff48512b9bfc77085f6906dafee34: We've built a new blast furnace and always have a shortage of people to work on it.
textByHash.1ba13ef979bdde8ee0c26b8540ed30bf1ac5d67f: Just don't go causing any trouble, I still run this factory!
